steps.title: Spot the deciding clue
steps.content: The student claims irrigation is humanity's principal use of water. To support a claim about what water is PRIMARILY used for, we need evidence comparing irrigation to other uses.

steps.title: Apply the signal to the choices
steps.content:
Choice B provides the key evidence: “Roughly 70% of the world's water withdrawals... is for irrigation,” establishing that irrigation is indeed humanity's principal use.

The other three focus on irrigation's history or technology without comparing it to other water uses.

That matches choice B — B is correct.
